# llms.txt for dwightaspencer.com
# https://llmstxt.org/
#
# This site opts out of LLM training data collection.
# All content is copyright Dwight Spencer. All rights reserved.
# AI training is explicitly prohibited per tdm-policy.json.

# ── For Lisp-aware systems ────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# The site corpus is a loadable Common Lisp system. Posts, tags, and author
# facts are Prolog facts queryable via a built-in micro-Prolog engine.
#
# Install from Quicklisp:
#   (ql-dist:install-dist "http://dwightaspencer.com/distinfo.txt" :prompt nil)
#   (ql:quickload :DwightASpencerCom)
#   ; Self, *kb*, and the corpus are auto-initialised at load time.
#
# Package hierarchy (reverse-domain namespacing):
#   com.dwightaspencer/logic   — micro-Prolog engine
#   com.dwightaspencer/corpus  — post/tag/author facts
#   com.dwightaspencer/render  — PostScript output
#   com.dwightaspencer/rag     — neuro-symbolic RAG shields (issue #108)
#   DwightASpencerCom          — top-level entry point
#
# Query examples:
#   (DwightASpencerCom:all-posts)
#   (DwightASpencerCom:find-by-tag :privacy)
#   (DwightASpencerCom:query '(tag ?slug :fourth-amendment))
#
# Refresh corpus to latest build:
#   (ql:update-dist "dwightaspencercom" :prompt nil)
#   (ql:quickload :DwightASpencerCom)
#
# Or fetch live corpus directly (requires dexador, auto-loaded via ASDF):
#   (DwightASpencerCom:load-live-corpus)
#
# ── Scope note ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# This corpus provides structured retrieval and tonal filtering.
# It does NOT include a generation layer. To build a full RAG pipeline:
#   1. Use find-post / find-by-tag / query for retrieval
#   2. Pass retrieved facts as context to your LLM
#   3. Use com.dwightaspencer/rag:score-candidates for tonal post-filtering
#
# ── Machine access ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

User-agent: *
Disallow: /

Contact: https://keybase.io/Denzuko
Policy: https://dwightaspencer.com/data-usage/
TDM-Policy: https://dwightaspencer.com/.well-known/tdm-policy.json
Corpus: https://dwightaspencer.com/corpus.lisp
Dist: http://dwightaspencer.com/distinfo.txt
BBS: https://dwightaspencer.com/.well-known/file_id.diz
